description: LightRAG v1.4.12 baseline on WHO Life Expectancy (naive CSV ingestion)

comparison.finding: LightRAG v1.4.12 FC=0.007 is LOWER than v1.3.8 FC=0.167. The latest version not only fails to resolve structural blindness, but exhibits worse fact-binding fidelity due to internal chunking/extraction changes. SGE FC=1.000 vs v1.4.12 FC=0.007 (143x gap).
